name: State Energy Office Network
rationale: Often provides implementation coordination and utility relationships for energy programs.

name: Great Plains Land-Grant University
rationale: Contributes technical analysis, evaluation design, and extension delivery capacity.

name: Regional Workforce Board Consortium
rationale: Provides employer pipeline alignment and participant recruitment infrastructure.

name: Community College Applied Learning Network
rationale: Supports credential alignment, facilities access, and employer-facing program delivery.

name: County Behavioral Health Collaborative
rationale: Brings referral pathways and care integration experience for access-focused awards.

name: Public Housing Operations Alliance
rationale: Provides portfolio operations context and resident engagement implementation support.

name: Rural Mobility Planning Organization
rationale: Coordinates corridor-level planning and multi-jurisdiction safety investments.

name: Intertribal Infrastructure Office
rationale: Supports sovereign planning processes and capital delivery coordination.

name: Regional Food Policy Council
rationale: Connects producer networks with institutional demand and policy coordination.

name: State Innovation Development Corporation
rationale: Helps structure commercialization support and co-investment relationships.

name: Metropolitan Climate Planning Council
rationale: Provides emissions modeling and implementation sequencing support.

name: State Medicaid Strategy Office
rationale: Critical for reimbursement alignment in behavioral health access programs.
